Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The GetFrameBufferLimits method returns a structure containing information on the limits this graphics device has around framebuffers, in the form of the FrameBufferLimits structure. These limits are fixed for the graphics device, and must not be exceeded by the application.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: A structure containing information on the limits this graphics device has around framebuffers
